evals.name: basic-core-analysis
evals.prompt: I have a core dump at /tmp/core.1234 and the binary is ./myapp. Can you help me debug it?
evals.expected_output: Should initialize gdb-cli session, gather backtrace and thread info, and provide analysis guidance

evals.name: attach-live-process
evals.prompt: My server process (PID 12345) seems stuck. Can you help me attach GDB to it and see what's happening?
evals.expected_output: Should use gdb-cli attach command, check threads and backtraces for deadlock indicators

evals.name: multi-thread-deadlock
evals.prompt: My multi-threaded program crashed. There's a core file at ./core.dump and binary at ./server. I suspect a deadlock. Help me analyze it.
evals.expected_output: Should analyze all threads, look for lock patterns, and provide deadlock analysis
